findings.message: New data-store write path with no metric or span instrumentation. The delete_items_by_prefix function performs database deletions but has no observability instrumentation (no metrics, spans, or logging), making this write operation invisible to observability systems.
findings.suggestion: Add span instrumentation (e.g., tracer.start_span) or metrics (e.g., counter/histogram) to track this delete operation. At minimum, log the operation with correlation IDs and track the number of rows deleted and operation latency.
